candidates.row_label: Cost of goods sold ex depreciation

variables.notes: Preferred the ex-depreciation COGS line because the target is direct production/service costs and should avoid D&A where possible.

Balance sheet asset, not an income statement expense.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

variables.notes: CR:c|high|misclassified. Per rule hierarchy, an explicit SG&A row exists but appears sparse across years, so selected Administrative/General Expenses plus Operating expenses for coverage. Excluded depreciation/amortization and balancing rows.

candidates.why: Interest-related, but only appears in one year and sign convention is unclear versus the more consistently reported Interest Expense line.

Generic finance costs, but no visible values and less precise than direct interest expense.
Mixed expenses/income and may include non-interest items; not preferred if direct interest expense exists.
Interest-related total, but no visible values and less granular than Interest Expense.
Net finance total includes non-interest items such as FX and other finance items; only use if direct interest expense is unavailable.
Best direct recurring financing-cost line and reported across multiple years.
Balance sheet liability, not income statement interest expense.

variables.notes: Selected the direct recurring interest expense line and avoided net finance totals/components that could introduce FX or other non-interest items.
